news.title: What Elon Musk’s Clash With Sam Altman of OpenAI Is Really About

news.title: Google Signs A.I. Deal With the Pentagon

news.title: From Indiana to Idaho, a Backlash Against A.I. Gathers Momentum
news.snippet: The widening movement is pulling in people from all walks of life, united by a worry that Big Tech will cash in while average Americans bear the costs.

news.title: Microsoft and OpenAI Loosen Their Partnership
news.snippet: Microsoft, OpenAI’s biggest financial partner, will continue to license the start-up’s technology but will no longer be its exclusive licensee.

news.title: UAE to Exit OPEC After Nearly 60 Years
news.snippet: On May 1, the United Arab Emirates will end its a 59-year membership in the oil consortium, allowing it to raise output during one of the most volatile energy markets in years.

news.title: Colorado's Anti-Repair Bill Is Dead
news.snippet: Colorado has led the US on legislation that ensures people can fix their stuff. Manufacturers tried to claw back that control but ultimately failed—for now.

news.title: The Race Is on to Keep AI Agents From Running Wild With Your Credit Cards

news.title: 2026北京车展观察（下）：汽车被AI重新定义，人车交互模式重写
news.snippet: 38万平方米，这个数字不仅刷新了北京车展的历史纪录，也让其规模跃居全球车展首位。2026年北京车展，共来自21个国家和地区的近千家参展商，带来了1451台展车，其中包含181台首发车和71台概念车。据统计，本届车展将吸引接近一百万名观众。本次车展主题定为“领时代，智未来”。各家展台的技术与产品发布会，都与智能化密切关联：从今全球年火爆的“小龙虾”引入智能座舱，到高

news.title: 轻舟智航于骞：以车规级量产安全，推动无人物流从万量级迈向真正规模化
news.snippet: “无人物流行业要真正实现大规模、健康的发展，一定需要经过大规模量产的经验积累，需要稳定可靠、车规级的要求作为根基。”4月25日，轻舟智航举行无人物流车产品推介暨战略合作签约仪式，并与云衢智联、鸿马科技等四家企业签署战略合作协议。行业专家、客户代表、合作伙伴齐聚一堂，共同见证轻舟智航以物理AI为引擎，推动无人物流行业迈入规模化落地的关键节点。
